author: mark
text:
review: squash via detached worktree when repo root is bare

bl review chdirs to store.root for git merge --squash. With a bare
gitdir hosting linked .balls-worktrees/, git refuses and the review
aborts. Detect core.bare and route the squash through an ephemeral
detached worktree at .balls/local/squash-<pid>, then update the main
ref from the bare gitdir. Non-bare roots keep the existing direct
path. Promote git::run_git_ok to pub(crate) so the new module shares
git error formatting.

Closes bl-56f4.
